title: Anti-war protestors picket at Prestwick amid row over US military planes

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Anti-war protestors picket at Prestwick amid row over US military planes. Anti-war protestors rallied at Prestwick Airport on Sunday afternoon amid an ongoing row over the US military's use of refuelling facilities...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Anti-war protestors picket at Prestwick amid row over US military planes
